topic: There is a recording on my answering machine from someone I have never met
title: There Is a Recording on My Answering Machine from Someone I Have Never Met | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: There is a message on my answering machine from a man who knows where I sleep.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an old beige plastic answering machine on a kitchen counter, a small red message indicator light blinking, the digital display showing the number 1 for waiting messages, dim evening light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I still have a landline. Old habit. Mostly use it for emergencies.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a corded landline phone on a wooden side table, beige plastic, slightly yellowed with age, an analog clock on the wall behind it, soft late afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I came home Tuesday and the message light was on.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior shot of a quiet kitchen at evening, a single lamp on, the answering machine on a counter visible in soft focus, a coat thrown over a chair in the foreground, vertical 9:16 framing
extreme close up of a hand pressing the play button on an answering machine, the button worn from years of use, the device casting a faint glow on the surrounding counter, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Static. Then a man clearing his throat.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an answering machine with a small speaker grille visible, the room around it dim, a kitchen window in soft focus behind, ambient evening light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a small white index card pinned to a corkboard near the phone, a name written in cursive at the top, the rest of the card blank, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then my address. Then a description of my bedroom.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a worn leather notebook open to a page with neat handwriting, a address visible at the top of the page, the rest of the page blurred, dim lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He said I was wearing a green sweater. I was wearing a green sweater.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a green sweater hanging on the back of a kitchen chair, the fabric slightly worn, ambient evening light from a kitchen window, the rest of the room in shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I checked my phone log. No incoming calls.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen showing a recent call log with no entries for the past several hours, the screen glow casting light on a hand holding it, dim ambient room light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The answering machine logs the time. Eleven forty seven AM. I was at work.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an answering machine display showing a digital clock readout and a recorded time stamp, the display digits clearly visible in dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I called the police. They told me to keep the recording.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand holding a smartphone with a notification visible from a non-emergency police line, dim home office light, the rest of the room in shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The next message arrived this morning. Same voice. Same details. Different sweater.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an answering machine with the message indicator now showing the number 2, a blue sweater hanging on a chair in soft focus behind, ambient morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
